# BookmarkOff

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="BookmarkOff icon">

2v8.344&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;" data-size="24" data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-header"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-preview" data-di-preview="true" aria-label="BookmarkOff preview"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="BookmarkOff icon"></div><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-controls"><label><span RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::BookmarkOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        BookmarkOff { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```
